title: elaphrium collinum
intro: Elaphrium collinum, also known as Indian calotropis, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and milky sap. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaphrium collinum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Elaphrium collinum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and ointments, although its usage should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
